subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of the land and whatsoever moveth thereon, and Sovereign of the sea and whatsoever swimmeth therein! I beseech Thee by the Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله البر و ما یتحرک علیه و مالک البحر و ما یسبح فیه اسئلک بالاسم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness
